top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board requests comment on proposal to require certain payment stablecoin issuers to maintain an effective customer identification program
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board requests comment on proposal to require certain payment stablecoin issuers to maintain an effective customer identification program
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Bank of England launches policy statement and draft rules on regulating systemic stablecoins
top_signals.summary: The Bank of England has today published its policy statement and draft Code of Practice (rules) for systemic stablecoin issuers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Apple Raises Mac, iPad Prices on Memory Shortage; Shares Dive
top_signals.summary: Apple Inc. took the extreme measure of raising prices of Macs, iPads, home devices and the Vision Pro on Thursday, seeking to offset cost hikes caused by an unprecedented shortage of memory chips and storage.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Apple sinks nearly 5% after price hikes on MacBook and iPad due to memory crunch
top_signals.summary: Tim Cook said last week that Apple would hike prices due to surging memory and storage costs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Getting to the World Cup Final Without Losing Your Mind
top_signals.summary: Massive crowds, limited parking and packed transit will make getting to the World Cup Final in New Jersey a logistical nightmare. Bloomberg's Aashna Shah and Randall Williams share the playbook to get to the match. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Micron stock jumps 9% after blockbuster earnings
top_signals.summary: The company's revenue more than quadrupled from $9.3 billion a year earlier to $41.46 billion, it reported on Wednesday
